title: Support assertion `default disable iff`
body:
What would you like added/supported?

Default disable construct for SVA.

I believe this is similar to #1482 though slightly different construct here.

```verilog
module m;
  bit clk, rst_n;

  default disable iff (!rst_n);
  default clocking dcb @(posedge clk);
  endclocking : dcb 
endmodule : m

```

Above code gives error as:
```log
%Error: af_vlt_sva_def_dis.sv:4:11: syntax error, unexpected disable, expecting clocking
    4 |   default disable iff (!rst_n);
      |           ^~~~~~~
```

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

Yes, but my exposure to Verilator source code (and parsers etc.) is minimal, so will attempt.
